steps.title: Link claim and illustration
steps.content: The first sentence says some inherited traits can change because of different factors. The second sentence gives eye color changing with age as a specific case of that general point.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice B signals the last step in a sequence, but no sequence is underway. Choice C signals contrast, though the second sentence supports the first. Choice D moves away from the prior claim. The answer is A.
